In Philadelphia revolvers were
given to strike breakers by tho
company and city officials and
were used In killing citizens.


1.-THE company couldn't afford to
lose $50 a day ON each car. It
had no right to stop Its cars or to
get into any argument with its
men that would force II to stop its
cars. That was the position ! took.


"All the company officials could
do was to come together with the
men, and within Sc hours after
the strike began it was over. And
while the arbitration was under
way, rules were made whereby In
the future, whenever there Is any
trouble between the company and
men, arbitration must be agreed
to by both parties.


That's all there was to It,"
